text:
is a male Japanese animator, animation director, character designer and illustrator.

Works

Theatrical Films

Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo (2012) - In-Between Animation
Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time (2021) - Character Design, Chief Animation Director, Digital Animation Retouch, Key Animation
Ryū to Sobakasu no Hime (2021) - Key Animation

TV Anime/OVA

Panty & Stocking with Garterbelt (2010) - In-Between Animation
Dantalian no Shoka (2011) - In-Between Animation (GAINAX; eps 1-4, 6-14)
Hōkago no Pleiades (ONA) (2012) - In-Between Animation
Kyōshinhei Tokyo ni Arawaru (2012) - In-Between Animation
Kill la Kill (2007) - 2nd Key Animation (eps 2, 15, 21), Key Animation (OP2; 4, 5 ,7 ,11 ,14 ,18 ,20 ,23 and 24)
Japan Animator Expo (2013) - Character Design (eps 3, 13), Animation Director (eps 3, 13), Key Animation (eps 3, 25, 31)
The Dragon Dentist (specials) (2017) - Character Design, Animation Director, Key Animation
Evangelion: Hakata Angel Attack Alternative (2019) - Key Animation
EVANGELION: 3.0 (-46h) (2023) - Key Animation
Mobile Suit Gundam GQuuuuuuX (2025) - Character Animation Director, Design Works
